examples:
Command Example
!tn-get-saved-action id=5
Context Example
{
"Tanium.SavedAction": {
"ActionGroupId": 315,
"ApprovedFlag": true,
"ApproverId": 1,
name: tn-get-saved-action

outputs.description: The ID of the group of clients to target. Tanium.SavedAction.ApprovedFlag Whether the saved action is approved. True is approved.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.ActionGroupId

outputs.description: The ID of the user to approve the saved action. Tanium.SavedAction.ApproverName The name of the user to approve the saved action.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.ApproverId

outputs.description: Date The time and date when this object was created in the database. Tanium.SavedAction.EndTime
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.CreationTime

outputs.description: The time and date to stop issuing actions. Tanium.SavedAction.ExpireSeconds The duration from the start time before the action expires.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The unique ID of the saved_action object. Tanium.SavedAction.LastActionId The ID of the action object that was issued last.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.ID

outputs.description: Date The start time and date of the action object that was issued last. Tanium.SavedAction.LastAaction.TargetGroupId
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.LastActionStartTime

outputs.description: The target group of the action object that was issued last. Tanium.SavedAction.LastStartTime Date
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Tanium.SavedAction.Name The name of the saved action object. Tanium.SavedAction.NextStartTime
outputs.name: The most recent date and time that the action started.

outputs.description: The next time and date when the action will start. Tanium.SavedAction.PackageId The ID of the package deployed by the saved action.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The name of the package deployed by the saved action. Tanium.SavedAction.PackageSourceHash The source hash of the package deployed by the saved action.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.PackageName

outputs.description: Date The time amd date when the action became active. An empty string or null starts immediately. Tanium.SavedAction.Status
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.StartTime

outputs.description: The status of the saved action. Can be: "0" for Enabled, "1" for Disabled, or "2" for Deleted. Tanium.SavedAction.TargetGroupId The group of machines to target.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The ID of the user who created the saved action. Tanium.SavedAction.UserName The ID of the user who created the saved action.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedAction.UserId
